title: Sunrun Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Sunrun reported Q4 2024 cash generation of $34.2 million, marking the third consecutive quarter of positive cash generation. The company paid down $132 million in recourse debt during Q4 with total cash balance reaching $947 million as of December 31, 2024. Full year 2024 total revenue was $2.04 billion, down from $2.26 billion in 2023. Customer agreements revenue grew 27% to $1.51 billion. Net loss was $2.85 billion, primarily due to a $3.1 billion goodwill impairment charge. Non-GAAP net income reached $333.7 million. Net Earning Assets increased to $6.8 billion with Gross Earning Assets reaching $17.8 billion. Sunrun added 32,932 customers in Q4 with 1.05 million total customers as of year-end. There were 889,186 subscribers representing 12% quarterly growth. Storage capacity installations reached 392 megawatt hours in Q4, up 78% year-over-year with storage attachment rates hitting 62%, up from 45% prior year. The company deployed 156,000+ cumulative solar and storage systems. Net Subscriber Value reached $19,177 in Q4, up 11% from Q3. 2025 guidance projects Q1 cash generation of $40-50 million and full year $200-500 million. CEO Mary Powell stated the company is growing, generating meaningful cash, and poised to improve results in 2025.
